steps.title: Track both measurements
steps.content: The sentence gives two constitutions and two separate word counts. The phrase after "these" must refer to the two lengths and show that the lengths belong to the constitutions.

steps.title: Use plural possessive form
steps.content: A and B use singular "length," which does not match the two word counts. D uses a plural noun but leaves out the possessive apostrophe needed to show ownership. The answer is C.
